title: Shri Vaijnath Temple
tagline: Shri Vaijnath Temple — spiritual town of Maharashtra

overview.short: Shri Vaidyanatha Temple (Marathi श्री वैजनाथ मंदिर ) is a temple to Shiva in Parli Vaijnath in the Beed district of Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Shri Vaidyanatha Temple (Marathi श्री वैजनाथ मंदिर ) is a temple to Shiva in Parli Vaijnath in the Beed district of Maharashtra, India. While performing the rite of Abhishekam male devotees are not allowed to wear clothes above the waist. It's the 5th Jyotirlinga among 12 jyotirlinga of lord Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Purli
topPlaces.description: Purli is a village in Regidi Amadalavalasa mandal of Vizianagaram district, Andhra Pradesh, India.

topPlaces.name: Parli Vaijnath
topPlaces.description: Parli Vaijnath is a city and a municipal council in Beed district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. Parli is Second largest city in terms of size and population in Bid district.

topPlaces.name: Parli Thermal Power Station
topPlaces.description: Parali Thermal Power Plant is located at Parali Vaijnath in Beed district of Maharashtra. The power plant is one of the coal based power plants of Maharashtra State Power Generation Company (Mahagenco).

topPlaces.name: Borna Dam
topPlaces.description: Borna Dam, is an earthfill dam on Borna river near Ambejogai, Beed district in state of Maharashtra in India.

topPlaces.name: Wan Dam, Ambejogai
topPlaces.description: Wan Dam, also known as Daunapur Dam, is an earthfill dam on Wan river near Ambejogai, Beed district in the state of Maharashtra in India.

items.note: Purli is a village in Regidi Amadalavalasa mandal of Vizianagaram district, Andhra Pradesh, India.
Parli Vaijnath is a city and a municipal council in Beed district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. Parli is Second largest city in terms of size and population in Bid district.

Parali Thermal Power Plant is located at Parali Vaijnath in Beed district of Maharashtra. The power plant is one of the coal based power plants of Maharashtra State Power Generation Company (Mahagenco).
Borna Dam, is an earthfill dam on Borna river near Ambejogai, Beed district in state of Maharashtra in India.
Wan Dam, also known as Daunapur Dam, is an earthfill dam on Wan river near Ambejogai, Beed district in the state of Maharashtra in India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shri Vaijnath Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shri Vaijnath Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shri Vaijnath Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Nanded Airport (90 km) and the nearest railway station is Solapur Junction (146 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shri Vaijnath Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shri Vaijnath Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shri Vaijnath Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Shri Vaijnath Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shri Vaijnath Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Purli, Parli Vaijnath, Parli Thermal Power Station, Borna Dam, Wan Dam, Ambejogai.
